name: HubSpot
tagline: CRM, marketing automation, and customer engagement.
security: Use private app access tokens for server-to-server integrations; reserve OAuth for multi-tenant apps.
Verify HubSpot webhook signatures (v3) using the X-HubSpot-Signature-v3 header and your client secret.
Scope OAuth grants to the minimum object types you actually need.
Never log full contact properties — PII filtering at the boundary.

patterns.name: Contact sync
patterns.description: Mirror users from your auth/payments system into HubSpot Contacts on signup or purchase.

patterns.name: Deal pipeline automation
patterns.description: Create or move deals through pipeline stages in response to product events.

patterns.name: Webhook subscriptions
patterns.description: Subscribe to contact/deal/company change events for real-time updates.

triggers.name: Contact created
triggers.description: Fires when a new contact is added.

triggers.name: Contact updated
triggers.description: Fires when a contact property changes.

triggers.name: Deal created
triggers.description: Fires when a new deal is created.

triggers.name: Deal stage changed
triggers.description: Fires when a deal moves between pipeline stages.

triggers.name: Company created
triggers.description: Fires when a new company is added.

actions.name: Create contact
actions.description: Add a new contact to the CRM.

actions.name: Update contact
actions.description: Update properties on an existing contact.

actions.name: Create deal
actions.description: Open a new deal in a pipeline.

actions.name: Update deal
actions.description: Update properties on an existing deal.

actions.name: Create note
actions.description: Attach a note to a contact, company, or deal.

auth.description: OAuth 2.0 for multi-tenant HubSpot apps installed by external HubSpot accounts.
